verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’m not scared of what tomorrow may bring I don’t worry much what this world would give I’m not ashamed to share the good Gospel I am proud to be the servant of my God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’ve got faith that keeps me going I’ve got strength that keeps me walking I’ve got grace and I am saved I’ve got Jesus in me I’ve got love that keeps me loving I’ve got joy and I’m rejoicing I’ve got peace and I am free I’ve got Jesus in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’m not scared to cross the vast ocean I don’t worry much about the surge and storm I'm not ashamed to speak the good Gospel I am born and proud to be the servant of my God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’ve got faith that keeps me going I’ve got strength that keeps me walking I’ve got grace and I am saved I’ve got Jesus in me I’ve got love that keeps me loving I’ve got joy and I’m rejoicing I’ve got peace and I am free I’ve got Jesus in me
